message:
test(procinfo): expand from 55 to 81 tests for process info system (wa-3e6m5)

Add 26 new tests across lib.rs (16) and macos.rs (10):
- All remaining LocalProcessStatus variant Debug strings
- Copy semantics verification for status enum
- flatten_to_exe_names with single child, three distinct children
- Empty argv/children struct defaults
- Live process tests: argv is nonempty, status is Run
- From<u32> conversion for all macOS status codes (1-5 + unknown)
- parse_exe_and_argv_sysctl: empty/long exe paths, unicode args,
  buffer-too-small edge case

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
